data: * Estimate does not meet NCHS standards of reliability / **While the estimate meets NCHS standards of reliability, its complement does not / -Quantity zero

In separate questions, respondents were asked if they had ever been told by a doctor or other health professional that they had: coronary heart disease, angina (or angina pectoris), or heart attack (or myocardial infarction). "Coronary heart disease" includes coronary heart disease, angina, or heart attack.
